name: Can I do AI SEO on a small budget, or does it only work for big brands?
description: You can start small. Focus on priority pages and high-value questions first, because those usually produce the best return on a limited budget.

mainEntity.name: Can I do AI SEO on a small budget, or does it only work for big brands?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can start with one or two priority pages and improve them first, so a limited budget is not a blocker. The best early wins usually come from pages that already get attention, answer common questions, or drive revenue.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can start small. Focus on priority pages and high-value questions first, because those usually produce the best return on a limited budget.
